certifications_assessed.name: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure AI Foundations Associate 2025
Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Certified Foundations Associate
IT Specialist – Data Analytics (Certiport / Pearson VUE)

reasoning: Reject — wrong domain entirely. This candidate is a web/backend software engineer with a Python, React, and FastAPI stack, targeting AI/ML and data science work. The JD demands an embedded systems Senior SW Developer with mandatory C, MISRA, AUTOSAR, and RTOS expertise for a RADAR/ADAS automotive role based in Chennai. Not a single must-have skill from the JD appears anywhere in this resume — no C, no MISRA, no AUTOSAR, no RTOS, no RADAR, no ADAS. The candidate is also still completing a Master's degree (graduating Aug 2026), has only internship-level experience, and is located in Bengaluru — not Chennai. This is a complete domain mismatch with zero transferable embedded skills. Do not proceed.
strengths: AI/ML PIPELINE DEVELOPMENT: Built an end-to-end AI speech enhancement system using CNN, Whisper ASR, and FastAPI — demonstrates ability to take ML models from research to deployment, a differentiating signal for a junior AI/ML role.

MICROSERVICES & BACKEND DEPTH: Delivered a 13-container microservices environment with Qdrant vector search and Gemini API integration at Fidelitus Corp, showing backend architecture awareness beyond typical intern profiles.
COMPETITIVE PROGRAMMING: Global Rank ~1600 in TCS CodeVita Season 11 Round 2 (2025) signals strong algorithmic fundamentals and problem-solving capability relative to their experience level.
gaps: ZERO EMBEDDED SYSTEMS EXPERIENCE: The JD mandates C programming, MISRA guidelines, AUTOSAR, and RTOS — none of which appear anywhere in this resume. This candidate has never worked in embedded or automotive software, making them entirely unqualified for this role.

WRONG DOMAIN AND LEVEL: The candidate is a web/AI/ML intern still pursuing a Master's degree with no production automotive software experience, operating at Junior level. The JD requires a Senior SW Developer with 4+ years of relevant embedded/RADAR experience and 8 years total — a gap of roughly 8 years and a completely different technical discipline.

scoring_factors.reason: No notice period specified; candidate appears to be between roles or in academic program — no penalty applied.
JD requires In-office work in Chennai; candidate is based in Bengaluru.
Candidate has only internship experience (effectively 0-1 year) against a JD requiring 4 years of relevant embedded experience — well below the 2-year minimum threshold.
JD gender preference is 'Any' — no penalty applied.
No college preference or exclusion specified in the JD — no adjustment applied.

availability_reason: Current internship at Fidelitus Corp ends June 2026 and MCA graduation is August 2026 — candidate is effectively available or near-available with no blocking notice period.
alternative_role_fit: Junior Python/AI-ML Developer or Backend API Developer
rare_assets: Global Rank ~1600 in TCS CodeVita Season 11 Round 2 — a high-signal competitive programming achievement at early career stage.
self_reported_unverified: 'Core member of the JobOS product team' at Fidelitus Corp — intern contribution scope and actual ownership level cannot be verified from the resume alone.
ERP Automation Module described as 'Selected by the college for technical capability and reliability' — no third-party validation or measurable outcome provided.
interview_flags: Clarify actual contribution scope at Fidelitus Corp — was this a production system or an internal prototype, and what was the candidate's specific ownership versus team output?
Probe any exposure to C programming or low-level systems — any embedded, microcontroller, or hardware-adjacent coursework in MCA program?
Clarify graduation timeline — resume shows MCA ongoing until Aug 2026 but internship listed as 04/2026–06/2026, suggesting overlapping commitments.
Ask whether the candidate applied intentionally to this embedded RADAR role or if it was an accidental application — domain mismatch is total.
Verify the TCS CodeVita Global Rank ~1600 claim — ask for certificate or leaderboard screenshot as this is the strongest signal on the resume.
